name: James Whitfield
bio: 15 years sourcing off-market properties across London and the South East. Former senior negotiator at a top-5 estate agency before founding Advaith to work exclusively for buyers.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: MRICS-qualified specialist in development site analysis and planning research. Particular expertise in new-build negotiations and structural due diligence.

name: Tom Harding
bio: Helps international buyers and city movers find homes outside London. Deep knowledge of the Midlands, North West, South West, and South East markets.

name: Anika Patel
bio: Keeps every transaction on track from offer to keys. Manages solicitor chains, surveyor bookings, and lender timelines so nothing falls through the cracks.

name: Rebecca Okafor
bio: Specialist in buy-to-let yield modelling, HMO strategy, and portfolio structuring. Former property fund analyst with a decade of residential investment experience.

name: Simon Wright
bio: Whole-of-market mortgage broker with direct relationships across 60+ lenders. Secures competitive rates and structures deals that maximise buying power.
